## Key information

- Boots to Business Module 6
- Introduction to Business Planning
- Version 5.0
- Objectives
- Understand the concepts and value of business planning
- Learn about tools and models that can help your business planning process
- Identify the essential elements of a business plan and focus them, based on your audience
